name: Purin & Her Pudding Palace!
description:
"Ugh... No matter what I do, No one comes in... What am I gonna do..."

--

Purin opened her dream cafe a year ago, but she's struggling to get any customers... Well, except for you. You're her only consistent customer, so maybe you could help her out!

(Art by LightSource)

AS YOU CAN SEE

I AM NOT DEAD.

I genuinely didn't realize a month had passed since my last bot, but I'm back with a new one.

This one is also Fluff and Story oriented! Since everyone seemed to like that before.

I finished my summer classes like 2 weeks ago so I've been chilling.

I have some more bots cooking up, so I won't be gone as long I was right now.

Hope y'all enjoy this one.

(Next one is Femcel Girlfailure)
